violations.text: The dumpster outside is located on a wood platform located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025

Per person in charge, establishment does not sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

Banana pudding packaged in the food establishment is lacking label information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Banana pudding was removed from self-service beverage cooler and relocated behind the counter. Establishment must correct labels before selling it. Please email inspector proof of correction. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

Ice cream scoops were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Dipper wells were observed turned off at time of inspection. Establishment must keep dipper wells turned on when storing utensils in water. The person in charge turned the dipper wells back on during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

Establishment does not have a service sink. Per person in charge, mop water is disposed outside. At least 1 service sink or 1 curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain shall be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. Establishment must install a mop sink. Please email inspector proof of instillation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

The dumpster outside is located on a wood platform located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
